name: truth_bounty_contracts

scripts.test:fuzz: forge test --match-contract WeightedStakingFuzzTest -vv && forge test --match-contract StakingFuzzTest -vv && forge test --match-contract IntegrationFuzzTest -vv
scripts.test:fuzz:extended: forge test --match-contract WeightedStakingFuzzTest --fuzz-runs 1000 -vv && forge test --match-contract StakingFuzzTest --fuzz-runs 1000 -vv
scripts.deploy:testnet: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/FullDeploy.ts --network optimism_sepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/optimism_sepolia.json
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/FullDeploy.ts --network optimism --parameters ignition/parameters/optimism_mainnet.json
scripts.deploy:token: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/TruthBounty.ts --network optimism_sepolia
scripts.deploy:staking: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Staking.ts --network optimism_sepolia
scripts.deploy:rewards: npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Rewards.ts --network optimism_sepolia

description: TruthBounty smart contracts with comprehensive fuzz testing
